Education
Iran University of Science and Technology (IUST), Tehran, Iran — MSc in Artificial Intelligence and Robotics
2020 - 2023 | Thesis: Classification of Human Breast Cancer Lesions in 3D-ABUS Images
Shiraz University, Shiraz, Iran — BSc in Computer Engineering
2015 - 2020 | Project: Linux-capable System-on-Board for embedded vision processing

Research Projects
Persian Text-to-Speech System with Single-Shot Voice Cloning
2026 | Transformer-based generative TTS for fluent Persian speech with single-shot voice cloning.
Ez-Crawl: Agentic Web Crawler
2025 | LLM-based crawler for prompt-guided structured extraction from raw HTML.
TDSC-ABUS2023 PyTorch Dataset Toolkit
2024 | Open-source toolkit for 3D ABUS challenge workflows (classification and segmentation).
Robotic Vision for Agricultural Automation
2020 | Computer vision system to detect optimal saffron flower cutting points.

Publications and Academic Service
Spherical Shape-Based Features for Classification of Breast Tumors in 3D-ABUS Images
A. Naderiparizi, S. Barekat, E. Kozegar, M. Soryani — IEEE Transactions in Medical Imaging (not-published yet), 2026.
Breast Mass Classification in 3D ABUS based on Laplace-Beltrami Spectra and Dual Path CNN
S. Barekat, A. Naderiparizi, E. Kozegar, M. Soryani — Expert Systems with Applications, 2025.
Peer Reviewer — Journal of Imaging Informatics in Medicine
2026 | Reviewed a manuscript on breast tumor classification with feedback on methodology and evaluation.
Judge — AI Research Challenge (SID and IranDoc)
2026 | Evaluated ML systems for scientific literature analysis, knowledge graphs, topic clustering, and key-term extraction.
